title: Episode 3 — Musk vs OpenAI (v16 weapon-kit, Juliet fixed)
description: Council debate on Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI's for-profit conversion. v16 doctrine: each character holds a pre-assigned 3-5 weapon arsenal (Tanaka=structural, Mercer=institutional, Kurogane=consequence-forward), Juliet runs Frost-Nixon recall pins. Re-render after fixing parser bug that dropped all moderator lines.
